app.name: Tech Fleet Network
app.tagline: The professional training platform for Tech Fleet.

accessibility.reportBarrierTitle: Report a barrier or request an accommodation
accessibility.reportBarrierIntro: Tell us what you experienced. We treat accessibility issues as priority bugs and respond to every message.
accessibility.submitted: Thanks — your message reached our accessibility team.

errors.generic: Something didn't work on our side. Please try again in a moment.
errors.network: We can't reach the network right now. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in before doing that.
errors.saveBlocked: We couldn't save your changes. Your session may have expired — refresh and try again.
errors.loadFailed: We couldn't load this just now. Refresh to try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find that page. Try the dashboard or use search.

empty.applications: No applications yet — browse open projects to get started.
empty.notifications: You're all caught up — new updates will land here.
empty.drafts: No drafts yet — start one anytime from My applications.
empty.events: No events scheduled — check back soon or invite your team.
empty.search: No matches yet — try a different keyword.

success.draftSaved: Draft saved — pick it up anytime.
success.applicationSubmitted: Application sent. We'll be in touch soon.
